title: Machaerina ekmanii
taxonomy: Machaerina ekmanii belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This family comprises of various genera, including Machaerina, which is a genus of sedges. Within the Cyperaceae family, Machaerina ekmanii is further classified as a species within the genus Machaerina. The classification of Machaerina ekmanii is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other species. Understanding the classification of Machaerina ekmanii helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships within the plant kingdom.
